questions.question: Describe the main difference between block coding and convolutional coding. (8 marks)
A cyclic code is a type of error-correcting code that uses a generator polynomial of degree 4 to detect single-bit errors. What is the minimum distance of this code? (5 marks)
A block coder has a coding rate of 2:3. What is the maximum number of bits that can be transmitted in a single frame? (5 marks)
